purpose: Define how exported Airbnb/message data can later train Amigo and Toon without putting private conversations in Git.

pilot.reason: Use the user's own pilot property before touching Maaike and Laurens' active Airbnb host workflow.

storageBoundary.git: Only schemas, labels, redacted examples, and safety rules.
storageBoundary.privateStorage: Raw exports, transcripts, guest PII, booking IDs, and message history.

guest.language: nl | fr | en | de | es | other

turns.intent: availability | price | check-in | amenities | complaint | refund | local-tip | post-stay | other

recommendedIngestionRoutes: Airbnb GDPR data export requested by the account owner
Official Airbnb-connected PMS or channel manager with authorized API/webhook access
Airbnb Partner Program access for Artificial Monks only after official approval
Open-source PMS as a dashboard or data-model base only, not as a direct Airbnb bridge unless paired with approved API access
forbiddenActions: Do not scrape private Airbnb inbox pages without explicit owner approval.
Do not use browser automation as the foundation for live Airbnb access.
Do not store Airbnb cookies, tokens, passwords, or raw private conversations in this repo.
Do not send guest messages automatically.
Do not test risky workflows on Maaike and Laurens' active Airbnb host account.
Do not change listings, pricing, calendar, house rules, availability, or cancellation settings.
Do not promise refunds, discounts, direct payment, late checkout, or exceptions without host approval.
Do not reveal exact address before booking confirmation.
